name: Peach Conserve (Marmalade)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Sugar per cup of fruit
recipeInstructions:
1. Quarter and seed the oranges but do not peel them.
2. Peel and pit the peaches.
3. Put both fruits through a food chopper using a coarse blade (should be chunky).
4. Measure the fruit into a large pot; add sugar according to the fruit measure.
5. Cook rapidly until the mixture sheets from a spoon; stir often.
6. Add the maraschino cherries.
7. Pour into hot, sterilized 6 oz. jars and seal with wax.
